mobile_consent.label_text: Check this box to receive promotional marketing texts (Exclusive text messaging-only deals, offers, and coupons)*
mobile_consent.consent_text: *By checking this box and entering your phone number, you consent to receive informational (e.g., order updates) and/or marketing texts (e.g., cart reminders) from [company name] including texts sent by autodialer. Consent is not a condition of purchase. Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Unsubscribe at any time by replying STOP or clicking the unsubscribe link (where available). Privacy Policy [link] & Terms [link].
